name: hoyeon
description: Spec-first development workflow automation for Codex and Claude Code

interface.shortDescription: Spec-first workflow automation for requirements, blueprinting, execution, and verification.
interface.longDescription: Hoyeon derives requirements from intent, turns them into a validated plan.json via hoyeon-cli, and coordinates agent execution. The Codex adapter is Bash-first in v1: it exposes skills and native-agent adapters while leaving hooks and MCP out of the initial migration slice.
